scripts.db:generate: pnpm --filter @maphari/auth prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @maphari/core prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @maphari/chat prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @maphari/files prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @maphari/billing prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @maphari/notifications prisma:generate
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter @maphari/auth prisma:deploy && pnpm --filter @maphari/core prisma:deploy && pnpm --filter @maphari/chat prisma:deploy && pnpm --filter @maphari/files prisma:deploy && pnpm --filter @maphari/billing prisma:deploy && pnpm --filter @maphari/notifications prisma:deploy
scripts.dev:all: pnpm infra:up && pnpm db:migrate && (pnpm dev:auth & pnpm dev:gateway & pnpm dev:core & pnpm dev:chat & pnpm dev:files & pnpm dev:billing & pnpm dev:automation & pnpm dev:ai & pnpm dev:analytics & pnpm dev:notifications & pnpm dev:public-api & pnpm dev:web & wait)
scripts.dev:all:min: pnpm infra:up && pnpm db:migrate && (pnpm dev:auth & pnpm dev:gateway & pnpm dev:web & wait)
